/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -g -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX12.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tooez.dir/src/codereader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tooez.dir/src/filereader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tooez.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o tooez
